allow: Bash(timeout 20 node -e "const m=require\('mongoose'\);const c=require\('./src/config'\);const R=require\('./src/models/Run'\);const F=require\('./src/models/FileTask'\);\(async\(\)=>{await m.connect\(c.mongoUri,{serverSelectionTimeoutMS:15000}\);const a=await R.deleteMany\({}\);const b=await F.deleteMany\({}\);console.log\('cleared runs',a.deletedCount,'tasks',b.deletedCount\);await m.disconnect\(\)}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.log\(e.message\);process.exit\(0\)}\)")
